title: Senior Project & Technical Engineer
description:
JOB SUMMARY

We are seeking a dynamic and results-driven Sales Executive / Sales Engineer to focus on consultant sales within the HVAC industry. The primary responsibility of this role is to secure product specifications (spec-in) for EC fans in tender documents and build strong relationships with consultants and relevant authorities to drive business growth.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

Specification Sales:

  • Promote and secure the specification of EC fans in tender documents for HVAC projects for both new and retrofit on existing buildings.
  •  Work closely and build good relationships with consultants to ensure our products are included in project designs and specifications.

Relationship Management:     

  • Develop and maintain strong, long-term relationships with M&E consultants, design firms, and relevant government authorities.
  • Act as the primary point of contact for consultants, providing technical support and product knowledge.
  • Working closely with marketing team to organize and conduct product presentation through “Lunch & Learn” on a regular basis.

Market Development:   

  • Identify new business opportunities within the consultant network and relevant industry stakeholders.       
  • Working alongside other sales colleagues, monitor market trends, competitor activities, and upcoming projects to ensure proactive engagement.

Technical Support:  

  • Provide technical presentations and training to consultants and authorities on EC fan technology and energy efficiency benefits
  • Collaborate with internal teams to ensure accurate and timely delivery of technical documentation.

Sales Reporting:

  • Prepare regular reports on specification activities, pipeline development, and market feedback.

EDUCATION and EXPERIENCE

  • Diploma or Degree in Mechanical / Electrical Engineering or related field
  • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in HVAC industry, preferably in consultant sales
  • Strong understanding of HVAC systems and energy-efficient technologies (experience with EC fans is an advantage).
  • Self-motivated, proactive, and able to work independently.

JOB-RELATED SKILLS & PRE-REQUISITES   

  • Strong consultative selling and relationship-building skills.   
  • Good knowledge of HVAC systems, ventilation design, and energy efficiency standards.
  • Ability to interpret technical drawings, tender documents, and specifications.    Proficiency in MS Office and CRM tools.      
      
  • Excellent communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills

Preferred Certifications       

  • Certified Energy Manager (CEM) – Advantageous for energy efficiency projects.      
  • Green Mark Professional (Singapore) – Preferred for projects involving sustainability.
  • HVAC-related certifications (e.g., ASHRAE membership, LEED AP) – Added advantage.

postedCompany.description:
The ebm-papst Group is the world's leading manufacturer of electric energy-saving motors and fans. It founded in 1963.


Singapore is the Headquarter for South East Asia market.

The company employs around 12,000 employees at 17 production facilities (including those in Germany, China, and the USA) and 57 sales offices worldwide. The headquarters is located in Mulfingen in the Hohenlohe district of Germany.
